title: polystichum imbricans subsp. imbricans
intro: Polystichum imbricans subsp. imbricans, also known as Pacific sword fern, is a species of fern native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pacific sword fern include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made through infusions or decoctions, and it is often used in teas or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
